'''Hollast VII''', or '''Hollast Seven''', also known as '''Hollastin Seven''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], morale among the [[Soldier/Legends|troops]] was at its lowest. Consequently, the demotivated soldiers received smuggled goods for leisure time activities to lift up the mood.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Underworld Trading|For the Troops}}</ref>

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fought to free the planet from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and from [[Glorga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in the [[Second Hollastin Insurrection]]. Glorga was eventually murdered and the planet became part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Planet-stub}}
